description: Style Note The luxe comfort and rugged styling of woodland's shoes are now replicated in its sandals. Wear these with off-duty ensembles for optimal comfort, without compromising on style. Product Details Brown sandals, straps across the forefoot and back heel to lock the foot in place, velcro closure for ankle straps to offer a customised Fit, suede cushioned footbed, outsole with grooves for grip Material and Care Suede, TPR outsole Wipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dust Use a suede brush to remove dust from suede parts Do not store in direct sunlight
